checklistAnswers.question: Is 'Other goods & services that increase independence' approved in the budget?
Is 'Other goods & services that increase health and safety' approved in the budget?
Is the item related to a need or goal identified in the Life Plan?
Will the item increase the independence and/or health and safety of the individual?
Is the item exclusively needed for the participant?
Is the item on the OTPS exclusion list? (see guidelines)
Can the item be funded through other sources?
Was the same item bought already in this budget year?

parsed.formTitle: Other Than Personal Services (OTPS) Pre-Approval Form
parsed.justification: A weighted blanket helps Shira with sensory regulation and sleep, supporting her health and safety at home.
parsed.safetyFeatures: Breathable fabric; evenly distributed weight; sized to the individual
parsed.valuedOutcome: Shira will improve sleep and self-regulation to participate more fully in daily activities.

webChecks.label: The item exists at the linked page, with a visible price
webChecks.criteria: The linked product page must show the requested item with a concrete visible price.

webChecks.label: Item is plausibly NOT on the OTPS exclusion list
webChecks.criteria: Judge the item against the OTPS exclusion list. When in doubt, Needs Review.

webChecks.label: Item price is within the $3,000/budget-year cap
webChecks.criteria: Compare the visible product price against the $3,000 per budget year cap.

findings.note: No page text was captured, so the item's existence and price could not be verified.
findings.label: The item exists at the linked page, with a visible price

findings.note: The requested item, 'Weighted blanket (therapeutic)', is not on the OTPS exclusion list.
findings.label: Item is plausibly NOT on the OTPS exclusion list

findings.note: No page text was captured, so the item's price could not be verified against the $3,000 cap.
findings.label: Item price is within the $3,000/budget-year cap

rateComparison.note: No page text was captured, so no rate could be found on the website.
